content.en:
"Can the Realm Fragment evolve into the Universe?"

It was the first time for many Dao Ancestors to know about such secrets, and it was no wonder that they were not to blame, after all, the Domain Realm was too mysterious, and they had never seen the Domain Realm, and their understanding of the Domain Realm came entirely from some broken classics and ancient treasures from the forbidden area.

"Ghost Face, it seems that your Dark God Temple has obtained a lot of ancient treasures from the forbidden area, and you even know such secrets!"

A Dao Ancestor was shocked,

Ghostface smiled, "Our Dark Temple is just lucky enough to know this secret. Our chaotic territory is surrounded by a forbidden area, and the location of this universe is also very close to the forbidden area, it should be a domain boundary fragment rushed out of the forbidden area, landed in this area, and slowly evolved into a universe, and then was used as a dual universe fusion process, thus giving birth to the great universe and the future Dao realm. "

"In this case, the value of this universe is unimaginable, will there be a domain inheritance here?"

A Dao Ancestor was moved.

Domain Inheritance!

Other Dao Ancestors were also excited, eager to enter this universe and look for the unknown inheritance.

"There may not be a Domain Realm Inheritance!" the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said: "The Domain Realm is so big, even if it is a fragment, it is estimated that there is nothing, if there is, we should be able to find it easily!"

"What if the level of the domain realm is too high for us Dao Ancestors to find out?"

"Maybe there is a inheritance, and it was also secretly taken away by the Dark Temple!"

A Dao Ancestor who was not dealing with the Dark God Temple spoke.

"Our Dark Temple has not obtained any Domain Inheritance!" "Ghost-faced Dao Ancestor hurriedly explained: "I can make an Origin Oath, if there is a Domain Inheritance, it is impossible for our Dark God Temple to tell the matter now, and we will definitely secretly look for other inheritances! Judging from the situation we have explored, this universe is just an evolution of the Domain Fragments, and there is no inheritance or other treasures. "

"But even so, the value of this future Dao Realm is far above that of the ordinary Dao Realm, if a treasure that can only be conceived by the Domain Realm is born, it will be too great for us!"

A Dao Ancestor said.

"Ghost Face, you haven't said why the Great Universe suddenly evolved, even if it was transformed by the Domain Fragment, it wouldn't suddenly evolve so fast, right?" asked the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

"Because we found the spirit of the realm and drew out a little power of the spirit, this led to the sudden evolution of the great universe. However, then the spirit of the realm was hidden again, and it was hidden even deeper, and even our Dark Temple was difficult to find, and it took a long time. But after 100,000 years, the Quasi-Dao Realm will be formed, and spirits will naturally appear, so there is no need to spend a long time looking for it!" explained the Ghost-Faced Dao Ancestor.

"Then let's wait for 100,000 years!"

Many Dao Ancestors decided.

However, among the many Dao Ancestors, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was looking forward to it on the surface and had no meaning, but in his heart he was thinking about his apprentice - Ye Tian.

"Ye Tian's talent is too shocking, could it be that he has obtained the inheritance of the domain realm?"

But soon, he shook his head again.

Judging from Ye Tian's situation, there are no other inheritances in his body, all of them come from the Void Heaven Pulse and the native inheritance of the universe, but the talent is too strong and too rebellious.

"It should be the luck of the Domain Fragment that has condensed into my disciple's body, creating my disciple's amazing talent, far beyond our Domain Realm Territory!"

Thinking like this, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was extremely excited.

After all, Ye Tian has already united his spirit and spirit, and it is inevitable to become a Dao Ancestor, and since he does not use the ancestral monument, he is perfectly in harmony with the Dao, and his potential is very great, and it is not difficult to surpass him.

Even, Ye Tian is expected to surpass the Dao Ancestor.

At that time, not to mention that the Void Heaven Pulse would become stronger, he was even expected to use Ye Tian's hand to impact the next realm.

This is a person who has attained the Tao and the chicken dog ascends to heaven!

As time passed, 100,000 years passed in the blink of an eye.

this day.

The entire universe has begun to metamorphose again, and its volume has become larger and larger.

Ten times over!

Hundredfold!

A thousandfold!

It expanded 10,000 times before it finally ended its transformation.

At the same time, a terrifying force emerged from somewhere in the Great Universe and merged into the Origin of the Universe.

This scene was unnoticed by the others inside the Great Universe.

But many Dao Ancestors outside the universe screamed one by one, because that power was the spirit of the domain realm, containing a power that transcended the origin.

It can only sense, but cannot intercept ingestion.

"Sure enough, it's the spirit of the realm, and the ghost face is not lying!"

A Taoist ancestor.

At this time, many Dao Ancestors had new thoughts.

Before, although the birth of a future Dao Realm attracted their attention, it was more that the True Ancestors below were busy, but they didn't pay much attention to it, because it was useless to them.

But now it's different, when it comes to the secrets of the domain fragments, they will inevitably intervene.

"More geniuses must be sent into this Quasi-Dao Realm, maybe this place will become the new core Dao Realm of this Chaotic Territory in the future!" sighed the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

The other Dao Ancestors also had the same idea, and immediately left one after another to start a new round of preparations.

----------

Void Heaven Temple.

The Terran Race and the other subordinate forces under the command of the Void Heaven Temple were all very busy, because the Great Universe was promoted to the Quasi-Dao Realm, the entire Great Universe had become ten thousand times larger, and the newly emerged territories had also increased ten thousand times.

Such a huge territory is waiting for their occupation.

Of course, all the top powers have an agreement to only occupy the newly emerged territories near themselves and not meddle in the territories of other forces, otherwise it will be tantamount to breaking the rules.

Thereupon.

The territory occupied by the Void Heaven Temple has increased by as much as 10,000 times in just a hundred years, which is such a huge territory, countless times the size of a universe.

This time.

Even ordinary humans of the human race have the possibility of occupying a star and becoming a lord by themselves.

A slightly more powerful human being is enough to occupy a huge territory.

This is a new era, an era of rapid development.

And soon, the third group of personnel came to the Great Universe from Chaos, and the arrival of these people meant that the competition in the Quasi-Dao Realm would increase many times and be many times more cruel.

Outside the Void Heaven Temple.

Many True Monarchs, half-step True Spirits, and Heavenly Monarchs led by Ye Tian were all leading the disciples of the Void Heaven First Lineage who had arrived in Chaos.

Rumble!!!!

The void cracked, and one after another figures appeared, basically all of them were true monarchs, and only a very small number of heavenly monarchs.

"Why are there so many disciples!"

Moon Swallowing True Monarch was shocked.

Originally, he guessed that this third batch of disciples should be thousands at most, at most tens of thousands, after all, the people who could come in were relatively powerful people with unusual status.

But the current situation is that a dense crowd of true monarchs has come, and there are too many of them.

Lakh!

Million!

Million!

......

How powerful the Void Heaven is in the vein, and there are countless True Monarchs accumulated over countless years!

But how could the Void Heaven Pulse send so many True Monarchs, is this going to war?

Ye Tian also frowned, feeling that something was wrong.

The number of true kings is too many!

Soon, the teleportation was over.

Tens of millions of true monarchs have arrived, from weak to strong, at different levels.

Moreover, among these people, there are Dao Ancestor personal lineage, true disciples, and Dao Ancestor descendants, and many of them are not lower than Ye Tian, or even slightly higher than Ye Tian.

Rumble!

A True Monarch walked out from among the tens of millions of True Monarchs and landed in front of Ye Tian.

"Hello, junior brother!"

The True Monarch smiled.
